summary: Tested Disable User feature and Backend Refactoring. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - User Management page shows Status column with Active/Disabled badges, toggle buttons work correctly for non-admin users, admin account cannot be disabled.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog button always shows 'Delete' text even for Disable/Enable actions. Should show 'Confirm' or be customizable based on action type.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in product dropdown. Cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns status ok
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns token
BACKEND: GET /api/users returns users with is_active field
BACKEND: PUT /api/users/{id}/toggle-status disables active user
BACKEND: Disabled user cannot login (returns 403)
BACKEND: Re-enabled user can login again
BACKEND: Cannot disable admin account (returns 400)
BACKEND: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns dashboard data
BACKEND: GET /api/batches returns batches list
BACKEND: GET /api/finished-products returns finished products
BACKEND: GET /api/dispatch returns dispatches
BACKEND: GET /api/milk-stock returns milk stock entries
BACKEND: GET /api/raw-material-master returns raw material masters
BACKEND: GET /api/semi-finished-master returns semi-finished masters
BACKEND: GET /api/finished-product-master returns finished product masters
BACKEND: GET /api/reports/wastage-loss-summary returns wastage data
BACKEND: GET /api/backup/history returns backup list
FRONTEND: User Management page loads with Status column header
FRONTEND: Active status badge (green) visible for active users
FRONTEND: Disabled status badge (red) visible after disabling user
FRONTEND: Toggle status button (ShieldOff icon) visible for non-admin users
FRONTEND: Admin user has NO toggle status button (correct)
FRONTEND: Create User button and form work correctly
FRONTEND: Disable User confirmation dialog appears on toggle click
FRONTEND: User status changes from Active to Disabled after toggle
FRONTEND: Success message shown after disable/enable action
FRONTEND: All 12 sidebar navigation links work after refactoring
action_items: MINOR: Update ConfirmDialog component to accept customizable action button text (currently hardcoded as 'Delete')
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routes is well-structured
All route files properly import from shared database.py, auth.py, and models.py
is_active field correctly defaults to True for existing users (using .get('is_active', True))
Admin protection in toggle-status endpoint correctly prevents disabling admin account
seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up automatically by test suite (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Disable User feature fully functional. Key endpoints: PUT /api/users/{user_id}/toggle-status toggles is_active field. Disabled users get 403 on login with message 'Account disabled. Contact admin.' Frontend User Management page has Status column showing Active (green) or Disabled (red) badges. Toggle button (ShieldOff/ShieldCheck icons) appears only for non-admin users. Backend was refactored from 4166-line monolithic server.py into 10 modular route files in /app/backend/routes/. All existing functionality preserved.

disable_user_toggle.admin_protection: Returns 400 if trying to disable admin account

disabled_user_login_block.behavior: Returns 403 with 'Account disabled. Contact admin.' for disabled users

features: No toggle button for admin user
